1.premise: Standing-up hair is like post-balloon sex static because both result from the same friction.
A hunched-over person is like a chicken pecking because both share the same bent-forward profile.
Resembling two celebrities could mean being their unwanted illegitimate child.
'Like a baboon under the sheets' implies sexual aggression, but reveals a painful anal condition.
Straining on the toilet with hemorrhoids is like a horror-movie ghost crawl because both involve contorted suffering.
